Written by Teddy
on November 05, 2022

jekyll spaceship plugin develop

I want to add local video and audio site to jekyll-spaceship. Would you give me some director on how to stat and how to do?

audio plugin

There are 3 main audio site here I want to add:

  1. QQ music
  2. kugou muisc
  3. netease music

網易音乐外链播放 大風吹

網易音乐播放 沧海一声笑

网易 播放　红尘笑

![](//music.163.com/song/media/outer/url?id=4878606.mp3)

最終決定使用网易音樂播放,原因其臨時音頻文件播放地址以//music.163.com/../..mp3格式符合jekyll-spaceship普通音频插件播放格式．

11月05日笔记　　待续．．．．．
